name: @futhark/sidecar
description: Headless Node entry points for Futhark services (used by the Tauri shell; Electron apps still own their own main process).

scripts.compile:laguz: bun build --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --external pdfjs-dist --external mammoth --external tesseract.js --external better-sqlite3 ./src/laguz.ts --outfile ./dist/futhark-laguz
